name: Starlite Holdings Limited
summary: Starlite Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in printing and manufacturing packaging materials, labels, and paper products in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, the United States, South East Asia, Europe, and internationally. The company offers molded pulp products for various products, such as drink or food trays, bowls and plates, clamshell containers, egg cartons, shipping materials, and point of purchase packaging products; produces labels; and prints children's and novelty books, and board games comprising pop-up books, board games, puzzles, and book kits. It also provides packaging products for household appliances, toys and games, greeting cards, consumer electronics, food and beverages, luxury, pharmaceuticals, and personal care products; blister, window box, and APET box packaging products; and luxury packaging products. In addition, the company offers electronic products, such as sound modules, light sensors, and electric motors for paper printing; and e-business services through its Website GreenTaNet.com. Further, it provides management services; manufactures and trades in machinery; trades in paper products and packaging materials; and holds trade and service marks. Additionally, the company produces, trades in, and distributes team green products and automated equipment, including 3-fold automatic gluing and folding machine, smart material transit warehouse, automated guided vehicle, and glittering machine under the Team Green and JIGZLE brands. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in San Po Kong, Hong Kong.
